codeInput.checkAnswerTryAgain: Check the answer and try again.

exerciseRenderer.checkAnswerTryAgain: Check the answer and try again.

dailyStart.title: Choose today’s subject
dailyStart.subtitle: Choose one subject. We’ll build a balanced set of {count} exercises across its eligible modules and lock it for today.
dailyStart.empty: No published subject currently has {count} eligible daily-practice exercises.

ai.helperLine: Explains the idea + approach — no final answer.

card.question: Question {n}
card.hiddenNote: Correct answer is hidden for this run.

Practice.title: Practice Generator
Practice.subtitle: Refresh keeps progress • ←/→ navigate • Enter submits

status.revealDisabled: Reveal is disabled for this run.

confirm.title: Restart session?
confirm.subtitle: Changing topic or difficulty will reset your current run.

result.title: Result
result.submitToValidate: Submit your answer to get validation.
result.revealedPractice: Scoring is complete. You can still fill, edit, reset, and run the solution before continuing.

questionPanel.footerTip: ← / → moves between loaded questions • Next loads a new question at the end • Enter submits

vectorDragTarget.instructions: Drag a (blue) to match target a* = ({x}, {y}) within tolerance {tolerance}.

vectorDragDot.instructions: Drag a so that a · b ≈ {targetDot} (tolerance {tolerance}).

summary.title: Session complete
summary.subtitle: You finished {answered}/{sessionSize} exercises
summary.reviewSubtitle: Refresh won’t lose progress • You can also go back to questions.
summary.urlTip: Tip: changing topic/difficulty updates the URL params.

summaryCards.niceWork: Nice work. Review missed ones (below) to lock it in.
summaryCards.perfectRunSubtitle: You didn’t miss any questions in this session.

mobile.helpUnavailable: Help is not available until the exercise loads.
mobile.helpIntro: Open hints one at a time. Revealing the answer finishes this exercise and awards no XP.
mobile.noMoreHints: You have opened every available hint.
mobile.revealWarning: This finishes the exercise and awards no XP.
mobile.revealConfirmBody: The exercise will be marked as revealed. You will earn no XP for it.
mobile.answerRevealedBody: Review the solution, then continue when you are ready.

assignment.title: Assignment
assignment.returnTitle: Leave the assignment and return to review

workspace.subject: Subject
workspace.subscriberLockedReason: Subscribe to choose any subject, topic, and difficulty.
workspace.fixedScopeReason: This practice run has a fixed subject and module.

subtitles.assignment: Complete the selected questions and submit your work.
subtitles.challenge: Solve the shared exercise and compare your result.
subtitles.standard: Choose a subject and topic, then practice in the full workspace.
subtitles.practice: Choose a topic and practice in the full workspace.

navigator.dailySubtitle: A fixed ranked set selected for today.
navigator.challengeSubtitle: Solve the exact exercise shared with you.
navigator.subscriberSubtitle: Select a subject, module, topic, and difficulty.
navigator.freeSubtitle: Subscribe to choose any subject, module, topic, and difficulty.
navigator.defaultSubtitle: Work through the current exercise set.
navigator.fixedReason: This exercise set is fixed for this experience.
navigator.dailySubjectReason: Today’s subject is fixed after the daily set starts.
navigator.dailyMixReason: The system balances today’s exercises across eligible modules in this subject. Exact module, topic, and difficulty controls belong to Unlimited Practice.
navigator.subscribeReason: Subscribe to choose a different subject or module.
navigator.resetExerciseDescription: Restore the starter workspace without refunding attempts already used.

stage.challengeDefaultSubtitle: Use the workspace, then check your answer when you are ready.
stage.practiceDefaultSubtitle: Choose a topic from the practice navigator and solve the exercise.
stage.loadingBody: The practice workspace will appear here when it is ready.

header.restartDescription: Clear this practice run and load a fresh set.

daily.title: You finished today’s practice 🎉
daily.freeNote: Your ranked practice is complete. Subscribe to unlock unlimited topic practice now.
daily.subscriberNote: Your ranked practice is complete. Unlimited topic practice is ready whenever you are.
daily.utcNote: Daily practice resets at midnight UTC.
daily.revealedNote: {count} revealed answer(s) counted as completed, not correct, and earned no ranked-answer points.
